placeholderNotice: Every public-facing figure was re-audited against its primary source (ONS, OBR, HMRC, House of Commons Library, IMF and DWP) on 11 June 2026, and the international comparison was re-pulled directly from the IMF DataMapper. Each figure carries its own source, date and confidence level on the page. Known caveats: the long-run historical timeline before about 2010 is a best-estimate reconstruction (confidence 'estimated'); the UK adults (18+) figure predates the ONS mid-2025 age breakdown, which is due in summer 2026; and the GDP figure is the denominator consistent with the published debt-to-GDP ratio rather than a single published release. See docs/UPDATING-DATA.md for the refresh process.
footerNote: Figures are official data and may be revised. Historical figures before about 2010 are best estimates. Every figure shows its source on the page.

confidenceLevels.official: Taken directly from an official published release.
confidenceLevels.provisional: Official but flagged by the publisher as subject to revision.
confidenceLevels.estimated: An estimate, interpolation, or nowcast, not a published official figure.
confidenceLevels.calculated: Derived by this site from other figures, such as debt per person.
